scripts.flash-totem: bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx flash totem left -y && bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx flash totem right -y
scripts.flash-eyelash: bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx flash eyelash left -y && bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx flash eyelash right -y
scripts.flash-corne: bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx flash corne left -y && bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx flash corne right -y
scripts.draw-iris: NODE_ENV=development bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx draw iris
scripts.draw-corne: NODE_ENV=development bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx draw corne
scripts.draw-eyelash: NODE_ENV=development bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx draw eyelash
scripts.draw-totem: NODE_ENV=development bun --cwd apps/cli index.tsx draw totem
scripts.draw-all: bun draw-iris && bun draw-corne && bun draw-eyelash && bun draw-totem
